infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: REDAT needs your location to track camels and show nearby community alerts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: REDAT uses the camera for camel photos and QR code scanning.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: REDAT uses the microphone for Arabic voice notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: REDAT accesses photos to upload camel images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow REDAT to use your location.
